tools.name: codegraph
tools.notes: Installed on this machine in WSL as /usr/local/bin/codegraph. Project .codegraph directories are cache/index data and should usually be rebuilt per project.

tools.name: openspec
tools.notes: Installed on this machine in WSL as /usr/local/bin/openspec. Project openspec/ directories belong with project source repositories.

tools.name: hindsight

install.summary: Restore or install Hindsight under ~/.hindsight and wire Codex hooks/wrappers for the target environment. Do not copy memory databases through this skills repository.

tools.notes: This machine uses Codex hooks that call $CODEX_HOME/bin/hindsight-wsl-hook.ps1, which delegates to WSL ~/.hindsight/codex/scripts/*.py.

tools.name: ponytail
tools.notes: Codex plugin marketplace from https://github.com/DietrichGebert/ponytail.git; installs plugin ponytail@ponytail.
